title: Web Application Brute Force Login Attempt
description: Detects repeated failed login attempts via HTTP 401/403 responses to authentication endpoints. Indicates brute force or credential stuffing attacks. OWASP A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Request URL' like '*/login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/signin*' or 'Request URL' like '*/authenticate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/auth*' or 'Request URL' like '*/api/login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/api/auth*' or 'Request URL' like '*/token*' or 'Request URL' like '*/oauth*' or 'Request URL' like '*/portal/login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/vulnerable/login*')) and (('Response Code' = '401' or 'Response Code' = '403')))
